source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A steam turbine receives steam from two boilers. One flow is 5 kg/s at 3 MPa, 700\circ\text{C} and the other flow is 10 kg/s at 800 kPa, 500\circ\text{C}. The exit state is 10 kPa, with a quality of 96%. Find the total power out of the adiabatic turbine.

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: A steam turbine receives steam from two boilers. One flow is 5 kg/s at 3 MPa, 700\circ\text{C} and the other flow is 10 kg/s at 800 kPa, 500\circ\text{C}. The exit state is 10 kPa, with a quality of 96%. Find the total power out of the adiabatic turbine.
